# LWSG-LUX-OS
A simple command-line operating system.
#### **The current code is an unfinished graphical test, almost unusable. If there is a usable version of the code, please send an issue or contact me via my email zgmcwcj@outlook.com.**
**The code is entirely self-edited, and the comments are all generated by AI, which may contain errors. Please verify carefully.**

Currently supported commands:
- TIME
- ECHO
- CLEAR
- REBOOT
